author: hollowstrawberry
description: Grab anime art from Gelbooru that match specific tags. Added buttons to inspect tags, grab another result, or edit your query. The slash command version features smart tag suggestions/autocompletion. This cog is kinda spammy.
install_msg:
💗 __**Booru**__
**This cog is allowed to display NSFW material in channels marked as NSFW.**```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load gelbooru
2. Enable the slash command with [p]slash enable booru
3. Sync slash commands with [p]slash sync
4. You may need to restart Discord to see the new command.
5. Due to usage restrictions you may need to set a free gelbooru api_key and user_id with [p]set api gelbooru api_key,YOUR_API_KEY /// [p]set api gelbooru user_id,YOUR_USER_ID```
short: Searches images on Gelbooru with slash command and tag completion support.
end_user_data_statement: This cog internally caches user searches for 24 hours, with no identifying information.
